layout.title: Vision - OpenAppCLI
layout.description: Learn about OpenAppCLI's core philosophy: Not Only Website, Not Only Data Collection. We are building the standard bridge for AI Agent and application interaction.

hero.title: Vision & Philosophy
hero.subtitle: Not Only Website, Not Only Data Collection
hero.description: We believe AI Agents should be able to directly operate any application, not through complex indirect methods.

items.description: Current AI Agents cannot directly operate applications, requiring complex indirect interactions
items.current: AI Agent → Parse Text → Simulate Operations → Unreliable
items.target: AI Agent → MCP Protocol → Direct Operations → Reliable

items.description: Establish universal language for AI Agent and application interaction through MCP protocol
items.current: Each application requires custom integration solutions
items.target: Unified Protocol + Standard Interfaces + Plug and Play

items.description: Enable any application to be easily controlled and automated by AI Agents
items.target: Universal application type AI Agent interaction platform

notOnlyWebsite.title: Not Only Website
notOnlyWebsite.subtitle: From Website to Universal Platform
notOnlyWebsite.description: Break through website limitations to achieve true universal application automation

points.title: From Website to Universal Platform
points.description: Not just website automation, but unified control of all application types
points.details: From Web + Electron to Desktop + Mobile + Game, achieving true universal application automation

points.title: Application Coverage from 20% to 100%
points.description: From only supporting Web applications to supporting all application types
points.details: Break through technical limitations, enabling AI Agents to operate any application

points.title: Unified Technical Architecture
points.description: One platform supporting all application types
points.details: Automatically adapt to different applications through intelligent strategy selection and Fallback mechanisms

notOnlyDataCollection.title: Not Only Data Collection
notOnlyDataCollection.subtitle: From Data Collection to Application Control
notOnlyDataCollection.description: Go beyond data extraction to achieve complete application behavior control

points.title: From Data Collection to Application Control
points.description: Not just data extraction, but complete application behavior control
points.details: From one-way information extraction to two-way application interaction, enabling AI Agents to fully control application behavior

points.title: From Information Tool to Interaction Platform
points.description: Go beyond the limitations of traditional tools
points.details: Enable AI Agents to not only get information but also control application behavior

points.title: Two-way Interaction Capabilities
points.details: Support click, input, navigation and all application operations

timeline.limitation: Only support Web applications, only extract data
Support more platforms, but still focus on data collection

timeline.focus: Not Only Website + Not Only Data Collection
timeline.breakthrough: MCP protocol integration, AI Agent native interaction, two-way application control

timeline.vision: Become the universal bridge for AI Agent and application interaction

items.title: Standardization
items.description: Establish AI Agent and application interaction standard protocol

items.title: Reliability
items.description: Provide production environment stable automation solutions

items.title: Innovation
items.description: Lead the human-computer interaction revolution in AI era

cta.title: Join Our Vision
cta.subtitle: Build AI Automation Future Together
cta.description: If you share our philosophy, welcome to join us in building the standardized ecosystem for AI Agent application interaction.
